channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dead tree (no leaves) on verge on path to Beckenham Place Park at Foxgrove end in front of Two Elms and The Spinney properties., 14th May
item.description:
Trees - Maintenance Lat/Long - 51.4139226305058, -0.0230530402302587 what3words - sheets.rested.keep Nearest address - Two Elms, Beckenham Place Park, Beckenham, BR3 5BN

item.title: Flytipped rubbish behind recycling bins, 14th May
item.description:
Fly-tipping Lat/Long - 51.4065599, -0.0639861 what3words - will.slurs.couches Nearest address - Flat A, 172 Croydon Road, Penge, London, SE20 7YZ

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croydon Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street spillage, 14th May
item.description:
The green food waste sacks were removed after two days but oil and food detritus left behind. This is a health and safety hazard which restaurants must be made aware of. They leave refuse out in the daytime. Is it possible for them to put sawdust in the refuse bags so oil doesnt spill into pavement? Thank you to street teams who do a great job.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nelson Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping by library, 14th May
item.description:
Fly tip in library car park been here weeks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A206, Lessness Heath, Greater London

item.description:
Big weeds

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maitland Road, Penge, Greater London

item.description:
Fly-tipping Lat/Long - 51.4045186, -0.0675836 what3words - retain.slimy.folds Nearest address - 9 Byron Close, Wheathill Road, Penge, London, SE20 7XS

item.title: OVERGROWN HEDGE WHICH IS CAUSING DAMAGE TO No153's SHED, 14th May
item.description:
Resident reporting they back onto Stoneham Park which has overgrown hedges & shrubbery which are now causing damage to the garden sheds due them being overgrown in size. They have grown very high which has impacted on the daylight in the garden. Please could someone look into this asap
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shearwood Crescent, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 230, Broadway, Blendon, Bexleyheath, Greater London

item.title: Deteriorated planters & overgrown grass & weeds, 14th May
item.description:
For the last 3 years these 3 planters at the entrance to Deway Lane, Tulse Hill Estate (next to Jubilee Primary School) have been deteriorating. Aldi the grass has not been cut in ages and there are weeds and litter.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tulse Hill, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping in alleyway, 14th May
item.description:
Residents at 7 Isla Rd, SE18 are flytipping into the alleyway behind the garden. This is a shared alleyway, with no access from the end as it has been gated, so they can be the only culprits.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Isla Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Has been say there for months, 14th May
item.description:
The car SORN but it’s a public road not a private road or drive. The road is very busy for parking and this car is just park there unnecessarily.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Thelma Gardens, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over ground tree, 14th May

item.title: Tall tree needs branches cutting back asap, 14th May
item.description:
There is a very tall tree with low hanging branches adjacent to our property and we are worried that winds could cause damage to our property. The roots are also affecting the surrounding pavement. We are also close to a primary school so mornings and afternoons there is a lot of cars parked here.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farleigh Avenue, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain, 14th May
item.description:
Garages are flooding every time it rains due to blocked drain.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Middle Way, West Heath, Greater London
